{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant / Admin",
  "description": "Bau Strabe Limited is a growing construction and project management company committed to delivering quality building and Civil Engineering projects.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant / Admin

Job Locations: Lagos &amp; Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Bau Strabe Limited is seeking a competent and detail-oriented Accountant / Admin to manage financial records and provide administrative support for smooth day-to-day operations.
	The ideal candidate will play a dual role in handling accounting functions and office administration, particularly within a construction / project-based environment.
	We are seeking a competent and experienced candidate to join our team and contribute to the successful delivery of our projects.


Key Responsibilities
Accounting Functions:


	Maintain accurate financial records, including ledgers, journals, and cashbooks.
	Manage accounts payable and receivable.
	Prepare invoices, payment schedules, and expense reports.
	Monitor project/site expenditures and report variances.
	Perform bank reconciliations and track company transactions.
	Process payroll and ensure statutory deductions (PAYE, VAT, WHT, Pension) are remitted.
	Support preparation of monthly financial reports and management accounts.


Administrative Functions:


	Provide general office administrative support.
	Manage documentation, filing systems, and record keeping.
	Coordinate procurement records and supplier documentation.
	Assist in managing correspondence, emails, and office communications.
	Support logistics coordination for site operations when required.
	Maintain staff records and assist with HR-related documentation.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	HND / BSc Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or related field.
	2&ndash;4 years relevant experience (construction industry experience is an added advantage).
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage).
	Good knowledge of Nigerian tax and statutory requirements.
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills.
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.


Key Competencies:


	Financial accuracy and accountability.
	Organizational and administrative efficiency.
	Time management and ability to meet deadlines.
	Problem-solving and analytical thinking.
	Ability to work independently and within a team.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to careers@baustrabe.com using &quot;Application for Accountant / Admin &ndash; Bau Strabe Limited&quot; as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-10",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-24",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",

    }

}



Accountant / Admin Job at Bau Strabe Limited




        
    

        
        Bau Strabe Limited is a growing construction and project management company committed to delivering quality building and Civil Engineering projects.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant / Admin

Job Locations: Lagos & Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Bau Strabe Limited is seeking a competent and detail-oriented Accountant / Admin to manage financial records and provide administrative support for smooth day-to-day operations.
	The ideal candidate will play a dual role in handling accounting functions and office administration, particularly within a construction / project-based environment.
	We are seeking a competent and experienced candidate to join our team and contribute to the successful delivery of our projects.


Key Responsibilities
Accounting Functions:


	Maintain accurate financial records, including ledgers, journals, and cashbooks.
	Manage accounts payable and receivable.
	Prepare invoices, payment schedules, and expense reports.
	Monitor project/site expenditures and report variances.
	Perform bank reconciliations and track company transactions.
	Process payroll and ensure statutory deductions (PAYE, VAT, WHT, Pension) are remitted.
	Support preparation of monthly financial reports and management accounts.


Administrative Functions:


	Provide general office administrative support.
	Manage documentation, filing systems, and record keeping.
	Coordinate procurement records and supplier documentation.
	Assist in managing correspondence, emails, and office communications.
	Support logistics coordination for site operations when required.
	Maintain staff records and assist with HR-related documentation.


Qualifications & Requirements


	HND / BSc Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or related field.
	2–4 years relevant experience (construction industry experience is an added advantage).
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage).
	Good knowledge of Nigerian tax and statutory requirements.
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills.
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.


Key Competencies:


	Financial accuracy and accountability.
	Organizational and administrative efficiency.
	Time management and ability to meet deadlines.
	Problem-solving and analytical thinking.
	Ability to work independently and within a team.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to [email protected] using "Application for Accountant / Admin – Bau Strabe Limited" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cyber Security Specialist",
  "description": "Ablaze Consultancy is a dynamic and results-driven firm specializing in recruitment, consulting, and leadership training. We are committed to helping organizations build strong teams by connecting them with top talent and providing strategic business solutions that drive growth and excellence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cyber Security Specialist

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are looking for a Cyber Security Specialist to join our team to work closely with the stakeholders to ensure that cyber security projects meet objectives across our organization.


Responsibilities


	Upgrade our network and infrastructure systems
	Implement and maintain security controls
	Identify and solve potential and actual security problems
	Assess the current situation, evaluating trends and anticipating security requirements
	Keep users informed by preparing performance reports; communicating system status
	Maintain quality service by following organization standards
	Maintain technical knowledge by attending educational workshops
	Contribute to team effort by accomplishing related results as needed.


Requirements and skills


	Hands-on experience analyzing high volumes of logs, network data and other attack artifacts
	Experience with vulnerability scanning solutions
	Proficiency with antivirus and security software.


Salary
N120,000 - N180,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: consultancyablaze@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-02",

  },

Cyber Security Specialist Job at Ablaze Consultancy




        
    

        
        Ablaze Consultancy is a dynamic and results-driven firm specializing in recruitment, consulting, and leadership training. We are committed to helping organizations build strong teams by connecting them with top talent and providing strategic business solutions that drive growth and excellence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cyber Security Specialist

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a Cyber Security Specialist to join our team to work closely with the stakeholders to ensure that cyber security projects meet objectives across our organization.


Responsibilities


	Upgrade our network and infrastructure systems
	Implement and maintain security controls
	Identify and solve potential and actual security problems
	Assess the current situation, evaluating trends and anticipating security requirements
	Keep users informed by preparing performance reports; communicating system status
	Maintain quality service by following organization standards
	Maintain technical knowledge by attending educational workshops
	Contribute to team effort by accomplishing related results as needed.


Requirements and skills


	Hands-on experience analyzing high volumes of logs, network data and other attack artifacts
	Experience with vulnerability scanning solutions
	Proficiency with antivirus and security software.


Salary
N120,000 - N180,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Field Logistics & Supply Officer",
  "description": "INTERSOS is an independent humanitarian organization that assists the victims of natural disasters, armed conflicts and exclusion. Its activities are based on the principles of solidarity, justice, human dignity, equality of rights and opportunities, respect for diversity and coexistence, paying special attention to the most vulnerable people.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Logistics &amp; Supply Officer

Job Locations: Zamfara

Job Purpose


	Carry out or supervise all logistics, supply and ITC activities in the base and associated projects according to INTERSOS standards and protocols to have the material, infrastructure and vehicles in optimal running conditions.
	Plan, oversight, and manage logistics and supply support operations to ensure smooth accomplishment of base/project activities.


Responsibilities
Logistics Information Management:


	Input Logistics Data in INTERSOS Logistics software (Intersos Management Platform &ndash; IMP and IMS for logistics warehouse) in an accurate and timely manner. Provide training to base staffs if required and support the implementation of INTERSOS Logistics software in the mission


Supply Chain Management and Procurement:


	Plan, coordinate and supervise the supply activities of the base and define the level of priority. Implement the adequate tools and procedures
	Carry out local purchases (RFQ and Direct Purchase) for goods and services in respect of INTERSOS and donor requirements and ensure that the line manager is aware of any problems linked to the quality or availability of the items to be purchased
	Follow up the payments of all suppliers and collect all the necessary supporting documents from them i.e. receipts and delivery notes. Ensure before any payment is made all originals are in coordination office
	Support the Country Supply Manager or Country Logistics Coordinator in ensuring that all procurements are completed on IMP and all necessary documents are uploaded and properly archived in IMS and in the finance department
	Support the Country Logistics Coordinator in ensuring that all Supplies are registered (INBOUND, OUTBOUND) are completed on IMS and all necessary documents are uploaded and properly archived in the IMS
	In collaboration with the Country Logistics Coordinator and the Head of field office Is responsible for the effective usage of the IMS and accounting of inventories
	Follow the defined Procurement Plan and coordinate the local purchases with project staffs
	Submit purchase requests to the Country Supply Manager for ITB and tenders and/or any other purchase that cannot be made locally
	Facilitate the negotiation with local purchasers and maintain good relationships with suppliers
	Run market assessments and update the pre-qualified suppliers&rsquo; lists
	Update all the supplier files and ensure all formation related to the supplier have been fully updated on the IMP
	Collaborate for the preparation of the monthly logistics report by the 3rd of every Month


Stock Management:


	Plan and follow on a day-to-day basis the Warehouse and Stock Management activities in the project or capital, ensuring compliance of INTERSOS standards, protocols and procedures.
	These activities include but are not limited to the following activities:
	physically and administratively managing non-medical and medical stocks in collaboration with the Country Supply Manager and the stock owners and assuming responsibility for the warehouse and its contents
	Ensure that all necessary tools and management procedures are in place to avoid stock ruptures, losses (expiries, damages due to bad storage conditions, temperature breach) and excess stocks. Regularly check inventory levels (physical counts), keeping inventories up to date and monitoring consumption. Monitor cold chain
	Ensure that data reported in INTERSOS Inventory Management System (IMS) are correctly used and accurate. Is responsible for both digital and physical archive of administrative documents.
	Check, record and arrange the goods received and ensure the availability of a wide range of items for various projects and departments (medical supplies, food, spare parts, tools, equipment, etc.)
	Ensure that all items are well organized and correctly stored according to their specificity, well protected, fully identified and easily accessible (cleanliness, security, access, etc.)
	Supervise the team under his responsibility including the definition and planning of each person&#39;s tasks (daily supervision and checking the quality of their work); draw up working schedule and organize and lead team meetings
	Perform delegated tasks according to his speciality and as specified in his job description


Facilities and Communications Management:


	Ensure the installation and maintenance of functional office space(s) and guesthouses facilities in an adequate living condition and in accordance with INTERSOS minimum standards and brand identity manual. Ensure the application of defined safety and security measures and make inspection visits to assess the rehabilitation needs of facilities
	Ensure that facilities have an appropriate IT and Communications infrastructure and equipment to sustain INTERSOS software platforms and in line with policies and procedures - allowing permanent communication between capital, projects, bases and HQ and proper management of the bases. Guarantees that all staffs in the mission have proper training on how to use communications equipment available (e.g. satellite phones, HF/VHF radios, computers, etc.)


Asset Management:


	Support on the purchase, use and maintenance of IT assets, office and project equipment and communication tools, while ensuring that all base assets registered in IMP are documented, issued with unique INTERSOS asset numbers, tagged and logged according to asset management policies and procedures
	Support the CLC/ IT Officer on reporting asset list at the end of project and oversee asset rollover according to defined destination with the Programs department
	Oversee regular fixed assets check on a quarterly basis


Transportation Management:


	Ensure that INTERSOS Fleet Management model, movement security protocols and Brand Identity Manual is applied in the base, fleet is checked, regularly maintained and that vehicles are insured and taxes are paid
	Follow-up on proper monitoring of fuel consumption and use of vehicle log-book, maintenance log, oil log and other fleet formats and templates by field logistics staffs. Ensure that proper documentation of vehicles (i.e. lease, insurance, mechanical inspection, etc.) is properly handled by logistics staffs
	Plan vehicles movements, tracking individual trips, and ensuring implementation of security measures
	Follow-up on proper monitoring of Generator fuel consumption, Generator logbook, Maintenance log, oil log and develop monthly Generator fuel consumption report by the 3rd of every Month


Human Resources Management:


	Monitor activities of contractors and team under his responsibility
	Supervise casual labourers


Applied Security:


	Monitor technical aspects of the project risk reduction policy, transport, communication, protection, identification and preparation of the technical aspects of the security policy and guidelines, evacuation plan and contingency plan, monitoring day-to day the application of security rules and reporting to the CLC and Head of Field office any problem that may arise.
	For this purpose, the Base Logistics Officer has to create an appropriate environment to facilitate security exchange of information


Position Requirements
Education &amp; Professional experience:


	Essential Tertiary education and formal technical training.
	Certifications in the domain would be an asset
	3 years&rsquo; experience in logistics and/or supply chain
	Desirable experience with other NGOs and use of Logistics systems/softwares
	Mission language essential. Local working language desirable
	Essential computer literacy (word, excel and internet) and radio equipment user-knowledge
	Service orientation
	Behavioural flexibility
	Results and quality orientation
	Teamwork and cooperation
	Stress management
	Commitment to INTERSOS principles
	Technical skills
	High level of integrity and understanding of procurement ethics
	Planning and organisational skills and ability to meet deadlines


Note


	Interested candidates should complete the form and attach their CV with Cover Letter following this format &ldquo;Surname_ Position you applied for&rdquo;.
	ONLY applicants whose competencies meet the requirements of the position will be contacted.
	Please note: Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis.
	INTERSOS reserves the right to close the advertisement before the stated closing date if a suitable candidate is identified.
	INTERSOS is committed to achieving workforce diversity in terms of gender, nationality, and culture. Individuals from minority groups, indigenous groups, and persons with disabilities are equally encouraged to apply.
	INTERSOS has a PSEA Policy that the successful candidate will be expected to comply with and promote.

Field Logistics & Supply Officer Job at INTERSOS Nigeria




        
    

        
        INTERSOS is an independent humanitarian organization that assists the victims of natural disasters, armed conflicts and exclusion. Its activities are based on the principles of solidarity, justice, human dignity, equality of rights and opportunities, respect for diversity and coexistence, paying special attention to the most vulnerable people.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Logistics & Supply Officer

Job Locations: Zamfara

Job Purpose
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Carry out or supervise all logistics, supply and ITC activities in the base and associated projects according to INTERSOS standards and protocols to have the material, infrastructure and vehicles in optimal running conditions.
	Plan, oversight, and manage logistics and supply support operations to ensure smooth accomplishment of base/project activities.


Responsibilities
Logistics Information Management:


	Input Logistics Data in INTERSOS Logistics software (Intersos Management Platform – IMP and IMS for logistics warehouse) in an accurate and timely manner. Provide training to base staffs if required and support the implementation of INTERSOS Logistics software in the mission


Supply Chain Management and Procurement:


	Plan, coordinate and supervise the supply activities of the base and define the level of priority. Implement the adequate tools and procedures
	Carry out local purchases (RFQ and Direct Purchase) for goods and services in respect of INTERSOS and donor requirements and ensure that the line manager is aware of any problems linked to the quality or availability of the items to be purchased
	Follow up the payments of all suppliers and collect all the necessary supporting documents from them i.e. receipts and delivery notes. Ensure before any payment is made all originals are in coordination office
	Support the Country Supply Manager or Country Logistics Coordinator in ensuring that all procurements are completed on IMP and all necessary documents are uploaded and properly archived in IMS and in the finance department
	Support the Country Logistics Coordinator in ensuring that all Supplies are registered (INBOUND, OUTBOUND) are completed on IMS and all necessary documents are uploaded and properly archived in the IMS
	In collaboration with the Country Logistics Coordinator and the Head of field office Is responsible for the effective usage of the IMS and accounting of inventories
	Follow the defined Procurement Plan and coordinate the local purchases with project staffs
	Submit purchase requests to the Country Supply Manager for ITB and tenders and/or any other purchase that cannot be made locally
	Facilitate the negotiation with local purchasers and maintain good relationships with suppliers
	Run market assessments and update the pre-qualified suppliers’ lists
	Update all the supplier files and ensure all formation related to the supplier have been fully updated on the IMP
	Collaborate for the preparation of the monthly logistics report by the 3rd of every Month


Stock Management:


	Plan and follow on a day-to-day basis the Warehouse and Stock Management activities in the project or capital, ensuring compliance of INTERSOS standards, protocols and procedures.
	These activities include but are not limited to the following activities:
	physically and administratively managing non-medical and medical stocks in collaboration with the Country Supply Manager and the stock owners and assuming responsibility for the warehouse and its contents
	Ensure that all necessary tools and management procedures are in place to avoid stock ruptures, losses (expiries, damages due to bad storage conditions, temperature breach) and excess stocks. Regularly check inventory levels (physical counts), keeping inventories up to date and monitoring consumption. Monitor cold chain
	Ensure that data reported in INTERSOS Inventory Management System (IMS) are correctly used and accurate. Is responsible for both digital and physical archive of administrative documents.
	Check, record and arrange the goods received and ensure the availability of a wide range of items for various projects and departments (medical supplies, food, spare parts, tools, equipment, etc.)
	Ensure that all items are well organized and correctly stored according to their specificity, well protected, fully identified and easily accessible (cleanliness, security, access, etc.)
	Supervise the team under his responsibility including the definition and planning of each person's tasks (daily supervision and checking the quality of their work); draw up working schedule and organize and lead team meetings
	Perform delegated tasks according to his speciality and as specified in his job description


Facilities and Communications Management:


	Ensure the installation and maintenance of functional office space(s) and guesthouses facilities in an adequate living condition and in accordance with INTERSOS minimum standards and brand identity manual. Ensure the application of defined safety and security measures and make inspection visits to assess the rehabilitation needs of facilities
	Ensure that facilities have an appropriate IT and Communications infrastructure and equipment to sustain INTERSOS software platforms and in line with policies and procedures - allowing permanent communication between capital, projects, bases and HQ and proper management of the bases. Guarantees that all staffs in the mission have proper training on how to use communications equipment available (e.g. satellite phones, HF/VHF radios, computers, etc.)


Asset Management:


	Support on the purchase, use and maintenance of IT assets, office and project equipment and communication tools, while ensuring that all base assets registered in IMP are documented, issued with unique INTERSOS asset numbers, tagged and logged according to asset management policies and procedures
	Support the CLC/ IT Officer on reporting asset list at the end of project and oversee asset rollover according to defined destination with the Programs department
	Oversee regular fixed assets check on a quarterly basis


Transportation Management:


	Ensure that INTERSOS Fleet Management model, movement security protocols and Brand Identity Manual is applied in the base, fleet is checked, regularly maintained and that vehicles are insured and taxes are paid
	Follow-up on proper monitoring of fuel consumption and use of vehicle log-book, maintenance log, oil log and other fleet formats and templates by field logistics staffs. Ensure that proper documentation of vehicles (i.e. lease, insurance, mechanical inspection, etc.) is properly handled by logistics staffs
	Plan vehicles movements, tracking individual trips, and ensuring implementation of security measures
	Follow-up on proper monitoring of Generator fuel consumption, Generator logbook, Maintenance log, oil log and develop monthly Generator fuel consumption report by the 3rd of every Month


Human Resources Management:


	Monitor activities of contractors and team under his responsibility
	Supervise casual labourers


Applied Security:


	Monitor technical aspects of the project risk reduction policy, transport, communication, protection, identification and preparation of the technical aspects of the security policy and guidelines, evacuation plan and contingency plan, monitoring day-to day the application of security rules and reporting to the CLC and Head of Field office any problem that may arise.
	For this purpose, the Base Logistics Officer has to create an appropriate environment to facilitate security exchange of information


Position Requirements
Education & Professional experience:


	Essential Tertiary education and formal technical training.
	Certifications in the domain would be an asset
	3 years’ experience in logistics and/or supply chain
	Desirable experience with other NGOs and use of Logistics systems/softwares
	Mission language essential. Local working language desirable
	Essential computer literacy (word, excel and internet) and radio equipment user-knowledge
	Service orientation
	Behavioural flexibility
	Results and quality orientation
	Teamwork and cooperation
	Stress management
	Commitment to INTERSOS principles
	Technical skills
	High level of integrity and understanding of procurement ethics
	Planning and organisational skills and ability to meet deadlines


Note


	Interested candidates should complete the form and attach their CV with Cover Letter following this format “Surname_ Position you applied for”.
	ONLY applicants whose competencies meet the requirements of the position will be contacted.
	Please note: Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis.
	INTERSOS reserves the right to close the advertisement before the stated closing date if a suitable candidate is identified.
	INTERSOS is committed to achieving workforce diversity in terms of gender, nationality, and culture. Individuals from minority groups, indigenous groups, and persons with disabilities are equally encouraged to apply.
	INTERSOS has a PSEA Policy that the successful candidate will be expected to comply with and promote.

title: Job Vacancies at Spectranet Limited
content:
Spectranet was awarded a License from the Nigerian Communications Commission in 2009 with the aim of promoting Internet Services in Nigeria. Over the last year, Spectranet has assessed and evaluated different technologies and mediums which would facilitate in providing the best data services best suited for Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Field Support Engineer

Job Locations: Festac, Ojo and Alaba - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage incidents, respond to requests for technical assistance in person, via phone & email
	Responsible for supporting post-sales customer activity remotely and on-site. 3] Responsible for carrying out detailed Site Survey & maintain proper documentation
	Perform installation and implementation and network integration at customer’s site Function / Domain Reporting To Place of Posting Essential Attributes Desired Attributes Nigeria
	Promptly investigate, resolve & report any incidents, errors, events or deviations. 6] Ensure installation, maintenance and troubleshooting is carried out within agreed OLA.
	Responsible for resolving concerns on signal strength, signal to noise ratio and similar parameters in accordance to Spectranet approved standard.
	Share insight & appropriate action against bandwidth consumption, virus infection and security threats. 9] Track and route problems and requests and document resolutions
	Prepare daily activity reports andInform management of recurring problems


Requirements


	Qualifications: HND, B.Sc Graduate in Electrical, Electronics, Computer ,Communication Info Tech.
	Proficient in WiFi, WiMAx, LTE, TCP/IP, WLAN, Ethernet, LAN, WAN, Device/Network level Troubleshooting, Computers (OS & Application Level), Analytical, Internet and Tech savvy, Customer Focused, Team Player, Relevant Industry Experience, been on the front end handling customers and team.


Salary
Competitive.

Application Closing Date: 12th June, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Field support Engineer" as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Enterprise Sales Manager

Job Locations: Abuja (FCT) & Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About The Job Role


	The Enterprise Sales Manager is responsible for driving sales growth by managing relationships with key enterprise clients.
	This role requires a strategic thinker with a strong understanding of the sales process and a proven track record in managing large accounts.
	The ideal candidate will cultivate relationships, develop sales strategies, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet our clients' needs.
	Candidates must be familiar with Lagos as a city and its business environment.
	They should have a background in telecommunications or Internet Service Providers (ISPs) and possess extensive knowledge and experience in Enterprise and B2B business.
	Additionally, candidates must have experience in fiber sales and a management portfolio of enterprise clients.


Job Responsibilities


	Develop and execute strategic sales plans to achieve company goals.
	Identify and target potential enterprise clients to expand the customer base.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders in client organizations.
	Lead negotiations and close high-value contracts with enterprise clients.
	Collaborate with marketing, product development, and customer support teams to enhance customer satisfaction.
	Analyze market trends and competitor activities to identify growth opportunities.
	Prepare and deliver presentations to senior management and clients.


Job Requirement


	A Bachelor's Degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field is required.
	A minimum of 5 years of experience in enterprise sales or business development, with a demonstrated history of managing large accounts and achieving sales targets.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proven ability to build and maintain client relationships.
	Exceptional negotiation and closing skills.
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously
	Candidates must be familiar with Lagos as a city and its business environment.
	You should have a background in telecommunications or Internet Service Providers (ISPs) and possess extensive knowledge and experience in Enterprise and B2B business.
	Must have experience in fiber sales and a management portfolio of enterprise clients.


Application Closing Date: 13th June, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and your preferred Location as the subject of the mail.

 

3.) Head, Fixed Line Business

Job Locations: Abuja (FCT) and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports to: COO / CEO
Age Bracket: not more than 42 years

Job Description


	The person would be responsible for delivering customer acquisition, retention and revenue targets for Fixed Line retail business based on FTTx and WTTx based technologies.
	The area of operation would comprise all Spectranet business locations.


Job Responsibilities


	Effective management of the Fixed line team, ensuring cold calling and funnel creation to meet the business goals.
	Churn control by ensuring robust relationship with the existing customers and ensuring issues are resolved quickly and efficiently.
	Formulation of quarterly / yearly business plans o Develop robust relationship with other functions to ensure TATs for installation are met and post sales handholding of the customers is done effectively.
	Delivery of monthly / quarterly / yearly customer acquisition and revenue targets as per the business plan.
	Periodic training of the team.
	Excellent communication skills, command over English language (both written and verbal).
	Expertise and gravitas and should be able to meet and finalize deals with CXO level / HNW individuals.
	Should have more than average proficiency in Excel, Power Point and Word o High levels of integrity and business ethics o A Go - getter attitude and should be able to work in a challenging environment. 


Job Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Engineering.
	The candidate should have a total relevant work experience of 12 - 15 years.
	Should have worked in a Telecom company (Mobile / ISP – in 4G LTE and FTTx environment.
	Must have experience in - Direct Sales experience in a B2C environment, Relationship building with the key decision makers, Handling a team of more than 10 Direct Sales executives (DSEs).
	Demonstrable previous experience in Direct selling within an ISP, Telecommunications or IT (communications related) Service Provider.
	Proven track record of handling & negotiating orders in a B2B environment.


Application Closing Date: 10th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and your referred Location as the subject of the mail.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Bank Sales Executive",
  "description": "Tribest is a corporate support solutions provider with a comprehensive range of people outsourcing services.
